notes: Base runtime profile exposes the standard ANJ-4200/SMG Protocol 1 surface.
Full cloud shadow-learning correlated 77 cloud write attempts and activated eight device-scoped learned controls; writes were captured but intentionally not applied.

known_limitations: Runtime telemetry is confirmed by user support archives.

Full shadow-learning completed and activated eight device-scoped learned controls; the learning proxy intentionally captured but did not apply cloud writes, so direct Home Assistant write/readback validation is still pending.
knowledge_summary: Anenji 4200 Protocol 1 variant has user support captures from an ANJ-4000W-24V device. Runtime detection resolves exactly to the SMG Protocol 1 surface, read telemetry is confirmed, and a full shadow-learning run mapped the SmartESS 0925 write surface without leaking writes to the real inverter. Treat controls as partial until specific Home Assistant writes are user-validated.
